title: Remove and inspect audio remote switch.

blocks.text: Remove and inspect audio remote switch.

items: If there are components of the SRS airbag system in the vicinity, refer to the work precautions and configuration drawings described for the SRS airbag system before proceeding.

blocks.text: Loosen screw (A). Disconnect the coupler (B) and remove the audio remote switch (C).

items: Work with care to prevent the screw from falling out.

blocks.text: Installation is the reverse of the removal procedure.

Measure the resistance between the audio remote switch 12P coupler No. 2 and No. 5 terminals at each position. position Resistance value I'm not pressing anything. Approx. 10kΩ SOURCE switch Approx. 3.7kΩ VOL. UP (+) switch Approx. 357Ω VOL. DOWN (-) switch Approx. 99Ω CH. UP（ ) Switch Approx. 1.7kΩ CH. DOWN（ ) Switch Approx. 775Ω Measure the resistance between the No. 3 and No. 5 terminals of the audio remote switch 12P coupler at each position. position Resistance value I'm not pressing anything. without continuity DISP switch Approx. 363Ω MENU switch Approx. 33Ω If it is out of the standard value, replace the audio remote switch.
